column3: In this objective, 3G is treated as an older generation that improved mobile data capability compared with earlier cellular service.
column4:
Memory Trick

Use the generation number as the recall anchor; do not over-focus on exact performance numbers.

column3: LTE is identified in the approved source as a 4G cellular technology.
column4:
Exam Trap

OpenAPlus does not turn the source's exact LTE rate examples into cards; the exam value here is recognizing LTE as a cellular generation term.

column3: The approved source emphasizes higher performance goals and additional IoT impact for 5G.
column4:

column3: A SIM identifies a cellular device to the carrier and can contain carrier and user information.
column4:
Memory Trick

“Identity” is the key word: the SIM identifies the subscriber/device relationship to the cellular carrier.
